items.title: DHS shutdown looms over Mar-a-Lago shooting as unpaid Secret Service agents neutralize armed suspect
items.description: Secret Service agents working without pay due to DHS shutdown shot armed intruder at Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort after he allegedly brandished shotgun.
